query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view of a curved multi-lane highway lined with tall street lamps emitting bright starburst light on both sides. Red and white streaks of light extend horizontally across the road surface. A large illuminated billboard stands in the background beyond a metal fence. Guardrails and vertical fencing run parallel to the road edges. A dark rounded object sits in the lower center foreground. The surrounding sky and landscape are deep black.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime view of a curved highway dominated by intentional motion blur that renders vehicle lights as sweeping red and white streaks across the roadway. The image exhibits exposure extremes with aggressively blown-out street lamp highlights against crushed black shadows that swallow environmental detail. A heavy orange-red sodium vapor cast permeates the scene, shifting the road and surroundings into a sickly warm monochrome. Tall street lamps with starburst halos line both sides of the roadway, a large illuminated billboard stands in the background, and a dark rounded object rests in the lower foreground.
